behavior_summary: The script implements the item's U8P_SWORD2::look/inspect handler. When the engine runs the U8P_SWORD2::look process for this item it emits a single short description bark: "longsword ".
After displaying the bark the process suspends/ends (the raw contains a suspend node immediately following the bark).
No dialogue branching, menus, helper functions, or external calls are present in the script; all gameplay effect is limited to showing the item name/description.
Item metadata (weapon properties such as baseDamage, damageModifier, damageType, etc.) is present in the file as resource metadata but is not referenced by any runtime nodes in this script.
notable_control_flow: Single-entry process (U8P_SWORD2::look) that performs: display bark -> suspend.
No conditional branches or menu selection paths; control flow is linear and terminates after the bark.
The process is classified as a U8P_SWORD2::look-type process (processType 0x0208) and is therefore triggered by the engine's inspect/U8P_SWORD2::look action (or equivalent fast-area entry semantics).
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the bark text "longsword " intentional (formatting/padding) or an artifact of extraction?

Are the weapon metadata fields (baseDamage=5, damageModifier=13, damageType=['blade'], etc.) consumed by the engine elsewhere (combat/equipment systems) even though this script does not reference them?
Could this U8P_SWORD2::look process also be invoked by fast-area triggers (enterFastArea) in some contexts even though the script only defines the U8P_SWORD2::look process?

main_function.name: U8P_SWORD2::look
main_function.purpose: Display the short item name/description when the player examines or 'looks at' the item.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the engine runs the U8P_SWORD2::look/inspect process for the item (processType 0x0208).
Inferred: may also run when the Avatar enters a fast-area trigger tied to this object's location (based on project fast-area semantics).

function_map.name: U8P_SWORD2::look
function_map.role: U8P_SWORD2::look/inspect handler that emits a single bark (short description)
